phase_1_ptau.source: Perpetual Powers of Tau (Public Multi-Party Ceremony)
phase_1_ptau.auditor_note: Phase 1 is trust-minimized as it relies on the public, decentralized Perpetual Powers of Tau ceremony. Only one of the 71 participants needs to be honest to guarantee phase 1 security.

auditor_note: This transcript uses sequential hash chaining (H_i+1 = Hash(H_i + contrib_i)) to prove that at least one honest participant destroyed their toxic waste. Independent verification can be performed by re-running the chain verification.
